title: Thai Shrimp Tom Yum Soup
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai soup made with succulent shrimp and a medley of aromatic spices. This dish is a perfect blend of sour, sweet, and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: piquant tom yum paste
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Heat the soup broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the piquant tom yum paste and stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the Thai chilies, fish sauce, and brown sugar (if using) to the pot and stir to combine.
Ladle the soup into bowls and garnish with chopped cilantro and sliced lime wedges.
